summary: The diff implements REQ-7 and REQ-8 by adding URL detection and rendering capabilities. A new urlFormatter utility was created to detect and linkify URLs in text. The SearchInterface component was modified to use this utility for rendering clickable URLs in search results. All URLs are configured to open in the same tab (no target='_blank'). The implementation covers URLs in abstracts, titles, and related topics as required.

hallucinated_features.description: Added hover effect with opacity change (hover:text-primary/80) and transition-colors animation for URL links
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest explicitly states to 'Maintain the existing OKLCH color system and visual design' and includes 'Preserve the current search interface layout and structure' as a constraint. Adding hover effects and transitions was not requested in REQ-7 or REQ-8.

hallucinated_features.description: Added underline styling (underline underline-offset-2) and font-medium weight to URL links
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-7 AC states 'URLs maintain the existing color scheme and styling consistent with the application's design' but does not request adding new underline or font-weight styling. The constraint to 'Maintain the existing OKLCH color system and visual design' suggests not adding new visual treatments.
